listOfQuestions.question: In Visual Art Techniques, what does "Line" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A mark that can define shape, direction, and movement
wrongAnswers: A three-dimensional object or the illusion of one
A method for creating the illusion of depth
A quick drawing that captures movement or pose

listOfQuestions.question: In Visual Art Techniques, what does "Shape" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A flat enclosed area
wrongAnswers: The lightness or darkness of a color
The area that draws the viewer's attention
A drawing that emphasizes outlines and edges

listOfQuestions.question: In Visual Art Techniques, what does "Form" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A three-dimensional object or the illusion of one
wrongAnswers: The surface quality seen or felt in artwork
Difference between visual elements
Using value to suggest light and form

listOfQuestions.question: In Visual Art Techniques, what does "Value" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: The lightness or darkness of a color
wrongAnswers: A pleasing relationship among colors
The distribution of visual weight
Smoothly transitioning between tones or colors

listOfQuestions.question: In Visual Art Techniques, what does "Texture" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: The surface quality seen or felt in artwork
wrongAnswers: The arrangement of visual elements
The size relationship between parts
Building an image through multiple applications of media

listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A pleasing relationship among colors
wrongAnswers: A method for creating the illusion of depth
A quick drawing that captures movement or pose
A thin transparent layer of paint or ink
